review_body: I bought this for travel and the battery lasted through four long flights without needing a charge.
The device worked after setup, but the mobile app crashed three times before pairing completed.
The audio quality is excellent for the price, but the charging case feels flimsy and the lid is loose.
After two weeks the left earbud stopped charging. I cleaned the contacts but it still would not turn on.
The headset is comfortable for long work calls and people said my microphone sounded clear.
The companion app sends too many battery warnings and I could not find a way to turn them off.
For the price this is a solid product. Noise cancellation is fine, though not as strong as premium brands.
Support approved a replacement, but the process took ten days and updates were unclear.
